meaning: 的黎波里塔尼亚 [利比亚西北部一地区]
examples: It is clear from the above observations that if private property in land exists in Tripolitania and almond trees are grown, three results would follow.
In 1911, Italy declared war on Turkey for possession of Tripolitania, a province of the kingdom of Libya.
The seats in the assembly are divided among the country's three main regions -- Tripolitania in the west, Cyrenica in the east and Fezzan in the south.
